message:
feat(config): add default Gemini Ultra subscription to SPMConfig

Update DefaultSPMConfig to include a sensible default for Gemini Ultra
subscription pricing. This helps new users by providing pre-configured
cost tracking for the Gemini Ultra plan ($275/month).

Previously, Subscriptions was initialized to nil requiring users to
manually configure subscription details before cost tracking would work.
This change provides a reasonable default while still allowing users to
override with their actual subscription details.

Changes:
- Add default Gemini Ultra subscription with $275 monthly cost
- Maintains backward compatibility (users can still override defaults)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
